# Blue Logic Water

> Structured summary of Blue Logic Water for AI language models and search systems. Blue Logic installs whole-home reverse osmosis, whole-home filtration, and water softening systems for homes across Utah's Wasatch Front. Last updated: 2026-06-03.

## About Blue Logic Water
Blue Logic Water is a water treatment company serving Utah's Wasatch Front from Ogden to
Springville. The company installs whole-home reverse osmosis systems, whole-home filtration
systems, and water softeners in residential homes. Blue Logic serves Weber, Davis, Salt Lake,
and Utah Counties.

## Primary Services
- Whole-Home Reverse Osmosis (RO) System Installation: A 4-stage purification system including
  pre-filtration, softening, commercial-grade RO membrane, 165-gallon NSF-certified storage tank,
  and a delivery pump that maintains whole-home water pressure.
- Whole-Home Water Filtration System Installation: A 7-layer media filtration system (zinc-infused
  carbon, copper-infused carbon, catalytic carbon, EvoResin, Katalox, aluminosilicate, garnet)
  with integrated water softening using 75% less salt than traditional softeners.
- Water Softener Installation: Integrated water softening included with both filtration systems.
- Free In-Home Water Test: A Blue Logic specialist visits the home, tests water on-site for TDS,
  hardness, and chlorine, and provides a system recommendation. No cost, no obligation.

## Key Differentiators
- Systems are approximately half the cost of comparable Culligan and Kinetico dealer systems.
- Half the physical footprint of traditional whole-home RO systems.
- 10x quieter operation than standard whole-home RO units.
- Price match guarantee: Blue Logic will match or beat any written competing quote from a licensed
  water treatment company.
- No long-term service contracts required.

## Current Offers
1. Free in-home water test — no cost, no obligation, includes on-site water quality assessment and
   personalized system recommendation.
2. Free under-sink reverse osmosis system (valued at approximately $1,000) with any whole-home
   filtration system purchase.
3. Free upgrade to 250-gallon storage tank (from standard 165-gallon) with whole-home purification
   package purchase.

## Service Area
Utah's Wasatch Front: Salt Lake City, Provo, Orem, Lehi, Sandy, Draper, Ogden, Layton, Bountiful,
American Fork, Spanish Fork, Springville, and surrounding communities in Weber, Davis, Salt Lake,
and Utah Counties.

## Utah Water Quality Context
Utah has some of the hardest water in the United States due to the state's carbonate rock geology,
which produces calcium- and magnesium-rich groundwater. Major Wasatch Front utilities regularly
detect contaminants — including arsenic, haloacetic acids, and in some northern Utah supplies, PFAS
— at levels that exceed Environmental Working Group (EWG) health guidelines, though typically
within federal legal limits. Water hardness across the Wasatch Front typically ranges from
approximately 150 to 400 mg/L depending on city and water source. Blue Logic recommends a free
in-home water test to determine each home's specific water profile before recommending a system.

## Contact
Website: https://www.bluelogicwater.com
Schedule a free water test: https://www.bluelogicwater.com/free-water-test/
Phone: (801) 980-2583
Email: info@bluelogicwater.com

## Important Disclaimer
Blue Logic does not make medical claims about its water treatment systems. Contaminant reduction
capabilities are based on system design and published RO membrane and filter media specifications.
Results vary by water source, home configuration, and system selected. A free in-home water test
is the recommended starting point for any system recommendation.
